betOfDay.analysis: Jokic at home getting points? We'll take that all day. Knicks are trendy but Nuggets have dominated this matchup historically at Ball Arena. The line moving to +1.5 shows respect for Denver. Home court advantage in Denver is worth at least 3-4 points. This is the play.

picks.reasoning: Jokic at home getting points is rare. Knicks trending but Nuggets own this matchup at Ball Arena. Line of +1.5 is too generous.
Rockets on a heater at Toyota Center. Blazers one of the worst road teams in the league. Lay the points.
Sons bouncing back at home. Pelicans inconsistent on road. Consensus -6 across books.

picks.game: Los Angeles Clippers @ San Antonio Spurs
picks.reasoning: Spurs young and hungry at home. Clippers haven't found rhythm on road. Wembanyama protects the paint.
Lakers need this one at home. LeBron and AD should play. Pacers struggle on West Coast road trips.
